text: Standing at the threshold of this R+D space, I am caught in a liminal pause, like a thought before it is spoken. Surrounded by glass and vivid displays, I feel curiosity ripple through me. The environment buzzes with the spirit of inquiry, and I sense the weight and thrill of possibility—the unfamiliar promising discovery. It is at once exhilarating and slightly disorienting, as every object hints at a question waiting to be unraveled.
